title: XanaNode Workspace Windows Runtime README
summary: Runtime notes for the packaged Windows executable surface of XanaNode Workspace.
content:
xananode-workspace runtime package

Executable: xananode-workspace.exe
The exe is self-contained as a Node runtime launcher.
The sibling app/ directory contains the packaged XanaNode implementation tree it loads at runtime.
No system-wide Node install is required to run the executable.

Keep the exe and app/ directory together.
